title: teucrium maritimum
intro: Teucrium maritimum, also known as Sea Daphne or Maritime Teucrium, is a perennial shrub native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its small, blue-purple flowers and dark green leaves. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and combat infections. The health benefits of Teucrium maritimum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, making it a popular natural remedy for various health concerns. In herbal preparations, Teucrium maritimum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
